title: Play fine
description: Play fine is a performance boosting modpack. It is designed to give minecraft players on low end systems to run the game at higher framerates, why also adding quality of life mods that dont disturb your vanilla experience.
body:
Play fine is a performance boosting modpack. It is designed to give minecraft players on low end systems to run the game at higher framerates, why also adding quality of life mods that dont disturb your vanilla experience.

This modpack doesnt lie about framerates. So please support and share this modpack as most other performance modpacks make up frames to get more downloads. All screenshots are legitimate. I guarantee every player to get at least 60fps at 16 chunks render distance on any PC that has an i5 1135g7 cpu or higher and at least 4GB Ram. Anything faster than that will experience frames up to 600+ fps (as tested on my gaming rig, specs listed at the bottom)

Important:

Voxy is a LoD mod like distant horizons, but doesnt render chunks. Voxy saves explored chunks and keeps them rendered. That way you can kind of paint your world using voxy, until you can see the farthest regions of your world from your base... given that you visited them before...

All tested on a gaming rig (radeon rx 6800xt, ryzen 5 7600x, 32GB DDR5-6000, 2TB) and my travel laptop (i5 1135g7 16GB Ram 512GB, no external gpu)
